verdict.evidence: The most notable temporal drift is the tense change from present perfect 'on ollut paikalla' (has been present) to simple past 'tutki' (investigated), shifting the framing from an ongoing/recent situation to a completed past action. Additionally, the collapsing of the minister's two-part statement loses the temporal nuance of 'ovat reagoineet välittömästi' (have reacted immediately).
